canonical_definition: A benchmark for evaluating sequential information retrieval from long contexts, featuring synthetic-temporal, real-temporal, and real-logical order needles embedded in texts from 8K to 128K tokens.
papers: A Causal Lens for Evaluating Faithfulness Metrics
